# init(screenshot:)

**Initializer**

Creates an attachment containing a PNG representation of the provided screenshot.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(screenshot: XCUIScreenshot)
```

## Parameters

- **screenshot**: The screenshot to wrap as an attachment.

## Discussion

Creates an attachment with a [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/uniformTypeIdentifier] of `"public.png"`. Equivalent to calling [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/init(screenshot:quality:)] with a `quality` value of [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/ImageQuality/original].

## Creating Attachments from Images and Screenshots

- **init(image:)**: Creates an attachment containing a PNG representation of the provided image.
- **init(image:quality:)**: Creates an attachment containing a representation of the provided image at the requested image quality.
- **init(screenshot:quality:)**: Creates an attachment containing a representation of the provided screenshot at the requested image quality.
- **XCUIScreenshot**: A captured image of a screen, app, or UI element state.
- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality**: Compression quality options for image-based attachments.
